PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi s1,zero,5      00000000010100000000010010010011
0x0004		addi s2,zero,0      00000000000000000000100100010011
0x0008		addi s3,zero,1      00000000000100000000100110010011
0x000c		addi s4,zero,256    00010000000000000000101000010011
0x0010		add s2,s2,s3        00000001001110010000100100110011
0x0014		addi s3,s3,1        00000000000110011000100110010011
0x0018		bne s3,s1,loop      11111110100110011001110011100011
0x001c		sw s2,0(s4)         00000001001010100010000000100011
0x0020		lw a0,0(s4)         00000000000010100010010100000011
0x0024		addi sp,sp,-8       11111111100000010000000100010011
0x0028		sw s2,4(sp)         00000001001000010010001000100011
0x002c		jal ra,check_positive00000000010000000000000011101111
0x0030		lw t0,4(sp)         00000000010000010010001010000011
0x0034		slt t1,zero,t0      00000000010100000010001100110011
0x0038		beq t1,zero,exit    00000000000000110000001001100011
0x003c		addi sp,sp,8        00000000100000010000000100010011
0x0040		jalr zero,ra,0      00000000000000001000000001100111
0x0044		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
